featuresPage.heroSubtitle: From predictive telemetry to autonomous warehouse orchestration, explore the tools redefining what it means to be a global logistics leader.

routeOptimization.title: AI Route Optimization
routeOptimization.description: Our proprietary AI engine processes live traffic, weather, and fleet capacity to generate the most fuel-efficient routes in real-time.

warehouse.title: Warehouse Intelligence
warehouse.description: Optimize pick-paths and vertical space utilization with automated WMS synchronization. Scale from 1 to 100 warehouses with ease.

telemetry.title: Real-Time Telemetry
telemetry.description: Monitor vehicle health, driver safety, and fuel consumption via integrated telematics. Convert raw data into actionable insights.

alerts.title: Smart Exception Alerts
alerts.description: Stop reacting to disasters. Our anomaly detection system flags potential delays before they happen, suggesting proactive rerouting.

compliance.title: Enterprise Compliance
compliance.description: Automatic audit logs, geofencing, and chain-of-custody tracking. Built to meet the strictest logistics security standards.

api.title: API-First Architecture
api.description: Integrate with SAP, Oracle, or custom legacy systems in hours, not weeks, using our robust SDK and webhook infrastructure.

infrastructure.title: One Dashboard. Infinite Control.
infrastructure.description: Our features aren't standalone tools—they are part of a deeply integrated ecosystem. When your warehouse updates, your fleet reacts. When traffic spikes, your customer knows. That is the Logi-Track advantage.

footer.copyright: © {year} LogiTrack Intelligence Systems. All rights reserved.
footer.builtFor: Built for the enterprise, optimized for the road.

mission.title: Orchestrating the Future of Global Trade.
mission.subtitle: At LogiTrack, we don’t just track shipments—we synchronize entire supply chains. Our mission is to transform fragmented logistics data into live intelligence.

vision.title: Eliminating the blind spots in modern logistics.
vision.description: Born from the intersection of AI innovation and operational expertise, LogiTrack was built to solve the most complex challenges in freight and warehouse management. We envision a world where every vehicle, warehouse, and shipment is part of a unified, self-optimizing ecosystem.

resilience.title: Predictive Resilience
resilience.description: We anticipate disruptions before they escalate. Our AI models analyze live traffic and capacity to keep your SLA at 98%+.

transparency.title: Radical Transparency
transparency.description: Empowering every stakeholder with a single source of truth. From the driver’s cab to the C-suite, total visibility is standard.

efficiency.title: Scalable Efficiency
efficiency.description: Built to grow with your network. Whether managing a local fleet or a global supply chain, our infrastructure scales seamlessly.

why.title: Why We Do It
why.subtitle: In an era of instant expectations, logistics is no longer a back-office function—it is a competitive advantage. LogiTrack provides the tools to turn that advantage into a market-leading reality.

hero.title: Moving Trade Forward
hero.subtitle: Empowering global commerce through unified logistics intelligence and radical visibility.

sections.title: Who We Are
sections.content: LogiTrack was founded to build a bridge between complex physical assets and digital intelligence. We bring order to the chaos of supply chain management, offering shipping teams absolute clarity.

sections.title: Our Global View
sections.content: We envision a self-optimizing logistics network where trucks, warehouses, and customer shipments are seamlessly connected. Every vehicle should travel the greenest, fastest route.

sections.title: Our Core Values
sections.content: Our operations are built on three primary principles: absolute transparency for every stakeholder, data-driven optimization, and engineering resilience against any disruption.

hero.title: Engineering Excellence
hero.subtitle: How we construct real-time, high-concurrency systems capable of processing millions of telemetry events.

sections.title: Real-Time Telemetry Processing
sections.content: We run on a highly concurrent, distributed backend. Incoming coordinates and IoT telemetry streams are processed via low-latency event queues and stored in time-series databases for real-time analytics.

sections.title: System Architecture
sections.content: Our design emphasizes strict separation of concerns. From Next.js server components to Prisma ORM schemas, every module is designed for performance, modularity, and rapid scalability.

sections.title: Performance Budgets
sections.content: We enforce strict performance limits: under 200ms response times for all API endpoints, light client-side assets, and 256-bit AES encryption standard on every connection.

hero.title: Press & Media Assets
hero.subtitle: Official brand assets, logos, typography files, and press contact resources.

sections.title: Brand Guidelines
sections.content: LogiTrack's logo represents precision, speed, and connectivity. We maintain strict brand guidelines to ensure visual consistency across all physical and digital displays.

sections.title: Media Resource Pack
sections.content: Download our comprehensive media kit, including high-resolution vector logos, executive portraits, and system screenshot collections.

sections.title: Press Contacts
sections.content: For media inquiries, interview requests, or official press announcements, please contact our public relations team at press@logitrack.com.

hero.title: Build the Future
hero.subtitle: Join our remote-first engineering and operations team and help rewrite global logistics logic.

sections.title: Remote-First Culture
sections.content: Our engineers, designers, and support professionals work across continents. We trust our teams, encourage deep work cycles, and collaborate asynchronously.

sections.title: Employee Benefits
sections.content: We provide competitive international salaries, equity shares, complete hardware setups, health insurance coverage, and learning budgets.

sections.title: Open Positions
sections.content: We are actively recruiting for senior roles: Frontend Engineers (React/TS), Systems Engineers (Go/Rust), Product Designers, and Operations Managers.

hero.title: Developer Documentation
hero.subtitle: Everything you need to integrate, query, and scale with LogiTrack APIs.

sections.title: Getting Started
sections.content: To integrate with the LogiTrack API, you'll need an active API Key, which you can generate from your Developer Settings dashboard.

sections.title: Authentication
sections.content: Secure all requests by passing your API Key in the authorization header: `Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY`.

sections.title: Fleet Tracking API
sections.content: Retrieve active vehicle positions, speeds, and diagnostic telemetry. `GET /api/v2/vehicles/live` returns JSON coordinates.

hero.title: Help & Support Center
hero.subtitle: Find step-by-step guides, frequently asked questions, and support channels.

faqs.q: How long does LogiTrack WMS integration take?
faqs.a: Basic WMS integrations can be completed within 2-4 hours thanks to our pre-built API connectors and webhook system.

faqs.q: Is additional hardware required for drivers?
faqs.a: No. Your drivers can download and use the LogiTrack driver app on any iOS or Android-based smartphone.
All your data is stored in our fully encrypted cloud servers that comply with SOC2 standards.

sections.title: Fleet Management Setup
sections.content: Learn how to register new vehicles, configure license alerts, upload insurance documents, and assign drivers.

sections.title: Route Dispatching
sections.content: Step-by-step tutorials on scheduling routes, dynamic stop sequencing, and sending share links to buyers.

sections.title: Account & Billing Options
sections.content: Manage user seats, change organization settings, configure billing methods, and download past receipts.

hero.title: Privacy & Data Protection
hero.subtitle: How we collect, encrypt, and secure your organizational and telemetry data.

sections.title: Data Collection Scope
sections.content: We collect vehicle location data, speed, sensor diagnostics, and user credentials solely to provide optimized routing services.

sections.title: Telemetry Privacy Guard
sections.content: Operational route histories and cargo temperature logs are encrypted. We never share or sell logistics data.

sections.title: GDPR & CCPA Rights
sections.content: You retain full control over your telemetry logs. Request complete data export or purge at any time.

hero.title: Service Level Agreement
hero.subtitle: Our commitment to high availability, platform stability, and support response times.

sections.title: Uptime Guarantee
sections.content: LogiTrack guarantees a minimum 99.9% uptime on all core database, telemetry ingest, and API endpoints.

sections.title: Support Incident Levels
sections.content: Critical issues (Severity 1) receive engineering attention within 30 minutes. Normal support questions are answered within 4 hours.

sections.title: Maintenance Downtime
sections.content: All scheduled infrastructure upgrades are carried out during weekend off-peak hours and announced 7 days in advance.

footer.description: The intelligence layer for global logistics. We provide the mission-critical data required to move the world with precision.
footer.rights: © 2026 LogiTrack Intelligence Systems. All rights reserved. Precision-built.
